title: sedum reflexum subsp. albescens
intro: Sedum reflexum subsp. albescens, also known as White Stonecrop, is a succulent plant species that belongs to the Crassulaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of White Stonecrop include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. White Stonecrop can be prepared in herbal remedies such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions and digestive problems.
